timeline: Data Custodians grant in-principle approval. 4. Ethics Approval - Researcher obtains HREC approval. 5. Final Approval - Researcher submits all documents to Data Custodians for final approval. 6. Linkage Key Creation - SA NT DataLink creates project-specific linkage keys. 7. Data Extraction - Data Custodians extract approved data variables. 8. Data Provision - De-identified data is provided to the researcher.
